analytics.executiveSummaryExplanation: Figures come from verified analytics and executive intelligence sources — model synthesis may formulate, but never changes numbers or sources.

analytics.unavailableLead: No analytics provider matched this request for your organization.

analytics.emptyMetricBasisExplanation: Aipify only surfaces KPIs, trends, and insights when underlying engines report source metadata — no synthetic metrics are generated.

analytics.blockedOperationLead: This analytics operation is not available in Companion runtime.
analytics.blockedOperationExplanation: Auto-generating reports, auto-applying insights, and auto-exporting analytics are blocked in this phase. Aipify prepares governed actions — you decide and approve.
analytics.unsupportedCorrelationLead: Aipify cannot infer cross-module correlation without explicit grounded source linkage.
analytics.unsupportedCorrelationExplanation: Comparable metrics from multiple modules may be shown as facts side by side — Aipify does not assume cause, correlation, or root cause without source-backed linkage.
analytics.crossModuleFactsAvailable: Cross-module factual views are available when periods and units are compatible and permissions allow all sources.
analytics.crossModuleFactsUnavailable: Cross-module factual views require at least two compatible grounded sources.
analytics.permissionDenied: Your role cannot access the analytics catalog.
analytics.entitlementBlocked: Analytics capabilities are unavailable while the organization subscription is paused.
analytics.privacyNote: Metadata-first analytics intelligence — sensitive metrics are filtered and private content is never exposed in Companion runtime.
analytics.policyNote: Insights require explicit approval before any action. Role-based permissions, tenant isolation, and audit logging apply to all analytics metrics.
analytics.insightAutoApplyBlocked: Auto-applying insights is blocked — humans decide and approve.
analytics.noRecommendationWithoutBasis: No recommendation is surfaced without verified metric or signal basis.
analytics.noInferredCorrelation: No inferred correlation — cross-module views list facts only.
analytics.factVsInferenceNote: Facts come from source metadata. Any synthesis labels inference clearly and never changes numbers.
analytics.sensitiveMetricsFiltered: Sensitive metrics are filtered from analytics summaries.
analytics.roleBasedAccessActive: Role-based access permissions are enforced for this organization.

whatIsApi.title: What is an API?
whatIsApi.directAnswer: An API is a secure way for two systems to communicate with each other. Aipify can use an API to retrieve approved information from your website, online store, or administration system. Access is limited to what your organization has approved, and read-only access should be used first so Aipify can retrieve information without changing anything.
whatIsApi.explanation: APIs are the connection layer between systems — not the same as finding API keys in admin settings.
